line_map.line: Out of the house! Down in the town!
Loud! Round! Proud! A mouse in the house!
The owl is in the town! Where is the owl?
The owl looks down. A loud, loud sound!
A cow! Out of the house!
The owl and the cow shout! Down in the town, so proud!
What is in the town?! POTATO! The owl in town.
